codeReview.summary: Historical import, JSON seeding, and merge logic are implemented, but the transition marker implementation is broken at runtime for lightweight-charts v5, so required marker behavior is not reliably delivered.

issues.description: The chart tries to call `setMarkers()` on the series object, but in lightweight-charts v5 marker APIs are provided via `createSeriesMarkers(series, ...)` (plugin API), not on `ISeriesApi`. Because `markerSeries.setMarkers` is undefined, the guarded call is skipped and the "New Venue" transition marker is never rendered.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Feature metadata requires `frontend-ui-worker`, but the transcript shows `frontend-trading` was invoked and handoff says `frontend-ui-worker` was unavailable. This suggests a skill-resolution mismatch that can cause workers to bypass assigned skill procedures.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: features.json:321 (`"skillName": "frontend-ui-worker"`), worker-transcripts.jsonl skeleton (Skill call uses `frontend-trading`), handoff.skillFeedback.deviations[0] claims `frontend-ui-worker` was not found.

sharedStateObservations.observation: A new operational command for this feature exists but is not registered in shared service command inventory.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: scripts/package.json adds `"import-history": "tsx src/import-history.ts"`, but `.factory/services.yaml` command list has no `import-history` entry.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The discovered GeckoTerminal history-retention limitation for this pool is not recorded in shared library docs, so future workers may re-investigate the same discrepancy.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: handoff.discoveredIssues notes data only back to Aug 2025 despite older pool creation; `web/data/historical-candles.json` earliest timestamp is 1754438400000; `.factory/library/*` contains no retention note (only generic GeckoTerminal mention in architecture.md).

summary: Review result: FAIL. The feature largely implements import and merge requirements, but the transition marker path is incorrect for lightweight-charts v5 and prevents the required marker from appearing.
